zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mather Jr於1528年出生在英國時，他的父親John Mather28歲，母親Marion Elizabeth Hendley29歲。他於1549年與Elizabeth Thester在英國藍卡爾博爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1633年住在英國爾。他去世於1601年4月24日在英國藍卡爾文維其可享年73歲，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mather Jr于1528年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Mather28岁，母亲Marion Elizabeth Hendley29岁。他于1549年与Elizabeth Thester在英国藍卡爾博爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1633年住在英国爾。他去世于1601年4月24日在英国藍卡爾文維其可享年73岁，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mather
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a mower or reaper of grass or hay, Old English mǣthere. Compare Mead , Mower . Hay was formerly of great importance, not only as feed for animals in winter but also for bedding.
variant of Mader , reflecting an alternative pronunciation influenced by Old Norse mathra ‘madder (plant)’.

variants.name: Mader
meanings: English: variant of Madder, an occupational name for a dyer or seller of dye, from Middle English mader, madour, mather, shortened forms of Middle English maderer, maderour, matherer ‘seller of madder’ or ‘dyer who used madder’. Mader or mather (Old English mædere, Old Norse mathra) was the name for the plant Rubia tinctorum, used medicinally and for making red dye. It was also a word for red dye made from other sources. Compare Mather .
German and Swiss German (also Mäder), Dutch and French (Lorraine): occupational name for a reaper or mower, Middle High German māder, mæder, Middle Dutch mader. Compare Moder .
French: metonymic occupational name for a carpenter, from Occitan madier ‘beam’.

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Mather Jr was born in 1528, in England, his father, John Mather, was 28 and his mother, Marion Elizabeth Hendley, was 29. He married Elizabeth Thester in 1549, in Bolton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Cheshire, England in 1633. He died on 24 April 1601, in Winwick, Lancashire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mather Jr est né en 1528, à Angleterre, son père, John Mather, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marion Elizabeth Hendley, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Thester en 1549, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Cheshire, Angleterre en 1633. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1601, à Winwick, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mather Jr 1528 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mather 28 und seine Mutter Marion Elizabeth Hendley 29. Er hat 1549 in Bolton, Lancashire, England Elizabeth Thester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1633 hat er in Cheshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 24. April 1601 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Winwick, Lancashire, England und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mather Jr è nato il nel 1528 nel England, il suo padre, John Mather, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Marion Elizabeth Hendley, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Thester nel 1549, nel Bolton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Cheshire, England nel 1633. Morì il 24 aprile 1601, nel Winwick, Lancashire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mather Jrが1528年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Matherは28歳，母Marion Elizabeth Hendleyは29歳であった。1549年にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンでElizabeth Thesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年にはイギリスチェシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1601年4月24日にイギリスランカシュアイアウィンウィックで73歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mather Jr(이)가 1528년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mather(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Elizabeth Hendley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1549년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 Elizabeth Thester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1633년도에 영국 체실르에서 살았다. 그는 1601년 4월 24일 영국 랭카실르 윈윅에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mather Jr nasceu em 1528, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Mather, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marion Elizabeth Hendley, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Thester em 1549, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1633. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1601, em Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mather Jr родился в 1528 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Mather было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Elizabeth Hendley, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Thester в 1549 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности чешир, Англия в 1633 году. Он умер 24 апреля 1601 г. в местности винвикк, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Mather Jr nació en 1528, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Mather, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marion Elizabeth Hendley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Thester en 1549, en Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1633. Murió el 24 de abril de 1601, en Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
